description: Send notifications to your own GroupMe destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise groupme:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your GroupMe bot post URL from your stored secrets and POST a native GroupMe {bot_id, text} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-groupme_msg

request.template: {"urls":"groupme://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.bot_id_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"bot_id":"${ customer_secrets.GROUPME_MSG_BOT_ID }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"bot_id":"${ customer_secrets.GROUPME_MSG_BOT_ID }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
